_comment: Write gimbal neutral roll/pitch/yaw offsets in degrees. The descriptor declares rollDeg/pitchDeg/yawDeg; this body forwards them to the Layer 0 command by reference. Stack converters expand the command into the appropriate PARAM_SET writes and validate read-back.

then.detail: Gimbal neutral write was accepted but one or more read-back values did not match.
Gimbal neutral parameter write was rejected by the autopilot.
Gimbal neutral calibration cancelled by operator.
Gimbal neutral calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
